title: Barefoot Moments Studio
sourceTitle: Studio Barefoot Moments Midjourney V7 V8 Subject
prompt:
Studio: Barefoot Moments, with Midjourney v7 and v8

[SUBJECT] running barefoot through [PLACE] at [LIGHTING], motion blur on legs, droplets suspended in backlight, horizon glow, spontaneous freedom, travel campaign energy, wide cinematic frame.

Stylization 100, no --p used, --ar 3:4
originalPrompt:
Studio: Barefoot Moments, with Midjourney v7 and v8

[SUBJECT] running barefoot through [PLACE] at [LIGHTING], motion blur on legs, droplets suspended in backlight, horizon glow, spontaneous freedom, travel campaign energy, wide cinematic frame.

Stylization 100, no --p used, --ar 3:4

promptTranslations.zh:
工作室：赤脚瞬间，使用 Midjourney v7 和 v8

[SUBJECT] 在 [PLACE] 上赤脚奔跑，背景为 [LIGHTING]，腿部运动模糊，逆光中悬浮的水滴，地平线光晕，自发的自由，旅行广告活力，宽幅电影画面。

风格化100，无 --p used, --ar 3:4
promptTranslations.fr:
Studio : Instants pieds nus, avec Midjourney v7 et v8

[SUBJECT] courant pieds nus à travers [PLACE] à [LIGHTING], flou de mouvement sur les jambes, gouttelettes suspendues en contre-jour, lueur à l’horizon, liberté spontanée, énergie campagne voyage, cadre cinématographique large.

Stylisation 100, pas de --p used, --ar 3:4
promptTranslations.ru:
Студия: Barefoot Moments с Midjourney v7 и v8

[SUBJECT] бежит босиком по [PLACE] при [LIGHTING], размытие движения ног, капли, подвешенные в контровом свете, светящийся горизонт, спонтанная свобода, энергия туристической кампании, широкий кинематографический кадр.

Стилизация 100, без --p used, --ar 3:4
promptTranslations.pt:
Estúdio: Momentos Descalços, com Midjourney v7 e v8

[SUBJECT] correndo descalço através de [PLACE] em [LIGHTING], borrão de movimento nas pernas, gotículas suspensas em contraluz, brilho no horizonte, liberdade espontânea, energia de campanha de viagem, enquadramento cinematográfico amplo.

Estilização 100, sem --p used, --ar 3:4
promptTranslations.ja:
スタジオ：裸足の瞬間、Midjourney v7 と v8

[SUBJECT] が [PLACE] を裸足で走る [LIGHTING]、脚のモーションブラー、逆光に浮かぶ水滴、地平線の輝き、即興の自由、旅行キャンペーンの活力、ワイドな映画的フレーム。

スタイライズ100、--p usedなし、--ar 3:4あり
promptTranslations.ko:
스튜디오: Midjourney v7 및 v8과 함께 하는 맨발의 순간

[SUBJECT] [PLACE] 에서 [LIGHTING] 동안 맨발로 달리며, 다리의 모션 블러, 역광에 떠 있는 물방울, 지평선 빛, 즉흥적인 자유, 여행 캠페인 에너지, 넓은 영화적 프레임.

스타일화 100, --p used 없음, --ar 3:4
